M-045.NAME: mtproto-user-cabinet
M-045.path: frontend backend/app/mtproto backend/app/main.py scripts docs/plans/Phase-31.xml docs/plans/Phase-41.xml scripts/phase41-kpproton-faketls-smoke.mjs
M-045.owns: User-facing API and compact dashboard UI for personal free Telegram MTProto proxy access.
M-045.purpose: Show every verified user their free indefinite MTProto proxy alongside KrotPN trial and VPN actions in the mobile cabinet.

exports.api-get-my-mtproto-proxy: Authenticated endpoint returning server, port, secret, tg link, status, and reissue guidance.
exports.view-mtproto-card: Dashboard card with primary https://t.me/proxy open action, full-link copy, copy server, copy port, and copy secret actions.
exports.view-mtproto-empty-state: Compact unavailable, pending, degraded, and reissue-required states.

ui-contract.primary: MTProto proxy status and copy/open actions fit the first mobile dashboard screen without hiding VPN trial state.
ui-contract.secondary: Manual Telegram fields remain available for desktop and mobile copy workflows.

constraints.constraint-1: The MTProto card must not create horizontal scroll at 360x740, 390x844, or 430x932.
constraints.constraint-2: Full proxy links are shown only to the authenticated owner and never in admin summary lists.
constraints.constraint-3: Phase-41 owner dashboard must show only the current KPprotoN ee fake-TLS link as active and must not present stale official dd links as usable production credentials.

phase-41-verification-design.check-1: Owner API and dashboard payload use server=u-*.krotpn.xyz, port=443, and secret=ee... after reissue.
phase-41-verification-design.check-2: Official credential-mode assignments render reissue-required or unavailable state until Phase-41 reissue completes.
phase-41-verification-design.check-3: Dashboard copy/open actions remain full-link owner-only behavior, with no secret-bearing console or smoke output.
phase-41-verification-design.check-4: Mobile dashboard remains compact after adding Phase-41 reissue messaging.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-14: Phase-31 local backend tests, frontend build, static mobile/API smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-14: Phase-34 local integration confirms post-verify owner dashboard/API reuses exactly one canonical MTProto assignment and keeps pending/unverified users secret-free.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-18: Phase-39 keeps manual fields but makes the primary Telegram action a https://t.me/proxy link and copy action a full-link copy to reduce manual secret-entry mistakes.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-19: Phase-41 verification design adds owner-cabinet gates for ee fake-TLS payloads, official-dd reissue-required state, redaction, and mobile compactness.

M-045.hotspot: H-031: User dashboard must show MTProto access compactly without hiding VPN trial status or config actions
